scope: blind re-audit of post-R19 state for pages 225, 249, 327, 363, 392, 432 + glossary spot

findings.defect: ISO 14001 certifies an environmental management system (EMS process), not that products themselves are environmentally friendly. The definition overstates scope by saying '証明になる規格で、取得することで自社がグリーン調達に適した会社' — this is a common exam-prep simplification but technically imprecise.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 環境にやさしい製品を作っているという証明になる規格

findings.defect: Same ISO 14001 over-simplification: '证明企业正在生产环境友好型产品的标准' — ISO 14001 certifies the management system process, not that products are environmentally friendly.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 证明企业正在生产环境友好型产品的标准

findings.defect: Same ISO 14001 over-simplification: 'certifies that a company manufactures environmentally friendly products' — it certifies the EMS, not product-level environmental friendliness.
findings.evidence_excerpt: It certifies that a company manufactures environmentally friendly products

findings.defect: JP definition for 論理積 is only 'AND演算の日本語名称' — no semantic content. A JP-primary learner gets no definition of the logic operation itself. ZH carries the full definition but JP/EN do not.
EN definition for 論理積 (Logical AND) is only 'Japanese name for the AND operation' — no semantic content. An EN-primary learner receives no functional definition.
findings.evidence_excerpt: Japanese name for the AND operation.

findings.defect: JP definition for 論理和 is only 'OR演算の日本語名称' — no semantic content. Same pedagogical asymmetry as 論理積.
EN definition for 論理和 (Logical OR) is only 'Japanese name for the OR operation' — no semantic content.
findings.evidence_excerpt: Japanese name for the OR operation.

findings.defect: JP definition for 排他的論理和 is only 'XOR演算の日本語名称' — no semantic content.
EN definition for 排他的論理和 (XOR) is only 'Japanese name for the XOR operation' — no semantic content.
findings.evidence_excerpt: Japanese name for the XOR operation.

findings.defect: JP definition for 否定 is only 'NOT演算の日本語名称' — no semantic content.
EN definition for 否定 (Negation/NOT) is only 'Japanese name for the NOT operation' — no semantic content.
findings.evidence_excerpt: Japanese name for the NOT operation.

findings.defect: surface.zh '参数（实参/形参）' adds the formal/actual parameter distinction (实参/形参) that is not present in the JP source '引数'. The JP context only uses 引数 generically. The gloss introduces a distinction the learner is not yet being taught, which may cause confusion.

Program example caption in ZH contains untranslated Japanese string literal 'こんにちは'. While intentional as a code string, ZH-primary learners unfamiliar with Japanese will not know it means 'hello', reducing pedagogical clarity.
Output example caption in ZH shows '山田さんこんにちは' untranslated. As program output, the Japanese stays, but no gloss is provided for ZH-primary readers.
findings.evidence_excerpt: 输出示例：山田さんこんにちは

findings.defect: g_538 ホスティングサービス surface.zh is '主机租用服务' (rental framing) but the kana_helper.zh_concept field has '主机托管服务' (hosted/managed framing). '虚拟主机服务' or '主机托管服务' is the industry-standard zh term. Internal inconsistency between surface.zh and kana_helper.zh_concept.
findings.evidence_excerpt: surface.zh='主机租用服务' vs kana_helper.zh_concept='主机托管服务'

g_161.notes: All three language surfaces are accurate and consistent. Standard terminology correctly applied.

g_538.surface_jp: ホスティングサービス
g_538.notes: surface.zh '主机租用服务' uses 租用 (rental) framing; industry standard is 主机托管服务 (託管/托管 = hosted/managed). Internal inconsistency with kana_helper.zh_concept='主机托管服务'. Not release-blocking but suboptimal.

backup_definitions_verification.differential_p432: CORRECT — correctly references 'last full backup' as baseline
backup_definitions_verification.incremental_p432: CORRECT — correctly references 'previous backup of any type' as baseline
backup_definitions_verification.distinction: CORRECT — the critical differential vs incremental distinction is accurately represented in all 3 languages

pages_detail.225: WARN — ISO 14001 definition overstates scope (product vs EMS certification) in all 3 languages
pages_detail.249: PASS — all definitions correct; white-box/black-box distinctions accurate; table verified
pages_detail.327: WARN — JP/EN definitions for AND/OR/XOR/NOT are content-free ('Japanese name for X'); truth tables verified correct
pages_detail.363: WARN — untranslated JP strings in ZH captions; 实参/形参 gloss over-specifies source term
pages_detail.392: PASS — all definitions correct; mainframe translations accurate
pages_detail.432: PASS — differential vs incremental distinction correctly and precisely defined in all 3 languages

glossary_detail.g_538: WARN — surface.zh/kana_helper.zh_concept inconsistency; non-standard zh term
